title: デビュー戦の後に・喧嘩道中始まりでい

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One goes all out in her debut race. Super
Creek and Oguri Cap, who came to watch, praise
her for her spectacular performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after the race, Inari One's excitement
remains at a burning high. She's ready and
motivated to start training for her next race!
